channel.title: U.S. District Court, District of Maine — Local Rules
channel.description: The District of Maine's Local Rules and their amendment history — procedural rules governing every civil and criminal case filed in the district. Prose/link page listing rules and linked PDFs with no repeating dated list, monitored by full-page fingerprint so rule amendments surface as change items.

item.title: Monitoring started: U.S. District Court, District of Maine — Local Rules
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
